subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abha Beauty! Until now, following thy return from America, several letters have been dispatched. And now likewise, from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی تا بحال بعد از رجوع امریکا چند مکتوب ارسال شد حال نیز از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
